title: Xpressbees South Asia Partners is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Xpressbees South Asia Partners is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Warehouse Manager looking for your next big career move? Xpressbees South Asia Partners in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Xpressbees South Asia Partners:
Xpressbees South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees South Asia Partners!
